# Python Releases for Windows

- [Latest Python install manager - Python install manager 26.1](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/pymanager-261/)
- [Latest Python 3 Release - Python 3.14.3](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/python-3143/)
[Latest Python install manager - Python install manager 26.1](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/pymanager-261/)
[Latest Python 3 Release - Python 3.14.3](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/python-3143/)

## Stable Releases

- 
                        [Python install manager 26.1 - March 31, 2026](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/pymanager-261/)





                                Download [Installer (MSIX)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/pymanager/python-manager-26.1.msix)

                                Download [MSI package](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/pymanager/python-manager-26.1.msi)

                        [Python 3.13.12 - Feb. 3, 2026](https://www.python.org/downloads/release/python-31312/)


                            Note that Python 3.13.12 cannot be used on Windows 7 or earlier.




                                Download [Windows installer (64-bit)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/python-3.13.12-amd64.exe)

                                Download [Windows installer (32-bit)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/python-3.13.12.exe)

                                Download [Windows installer (ARM64)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/python-3.13.12-arm64.exe)

                                Download [Windows embeddable package (64-bit)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/python-3.13.12-embed-amd64.zip)

                                Download [Windows embeddable package (32-bit)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/python-3.13.12-embed-win32.zip)

                                Download [Windows embeddable package (ARM64)](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/python-3.13.12-embed-arm64.zip)

                                Download [Windows release manifest](https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.13.12/windows-3.13.12.json)
